article_context.article_title: Best Balcony Plants 2024: Top Picks for Small Spaces
article_context.source_excerpt:
# Best Balcony Plants 2024: Top Picks for Small Spaces

The best balcony plants tolerate wind, handle pots, and look good from indoors. Our top picks for 2024 include lavender, dwarf olive, trailing rosemary, and compact hydrangeas.

## Sun lovers

Lavender and dwarf olive thrive on hot south-facing balconies.

## Shade tolerant

Hostas and ferns suit north-facing balconies with indirect light.
